title: Warden Nether Portal
description: Adds a new Warden style ruined Nether Portal to Deep Dark biomes.
body:
**Warden Nether Portal:**

This simple mod introduces a Warden themed Nether Portal that generates in Deep Dark biomes.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd40ac90c4220f7fdfd76cf09f912286e8dabd87.jpeg)

Inspired by the ruined Nether Portals found on the surface, this variant features a dark, ancient Warden-style design and is exclusively generated in underground Deep Dark caves.


Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
